package rulecoverage

func NegativeCustomRecoveryLogicRepeatedAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "custom_recovery_logic_repeated_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated recover or panic-to-response logic inside handlers instead of centralized recovery middleware."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
